# Intra Vector → Add Intra-Vector

*Auto-generated from CEVA-XC4500 Vec-C Intrinsics documentation*

---

Main table → Intra Vector → Add Intra-Vector

Add Intra-Vector

Instruction Type and Width           Instruction description
                                     Performs intra-vector addition between complex numbers in the
                                     same vector. Each complex number consists of real 32-bit part
Vector Add Complex Intra-Vector      and imaginary 32-bit part. The intra-vector addition results for
                                     each complex part are placed into 32-bit or 40-bit register
                                     destination determined by the vector register type.
                                     Performs intra-vector addition between sources that are located
                                     in the same vector. Each source is 32-bit wide. The destination
Vector Add Intra-Vector
                                     is 32-bit wide or 40-bit wide determined by the vector register
                                     type.
                                     Performs intra-vector addition between complex sources in the
                                     same vector. Each complex number consists of real 16-bit part
Vector Add Intra-Vector Word Parts   and imaginary 16-bit part. The intravector addition results for
                                     each complex part packed into 32-bit or 40-bit register

destination determined by the vector register type.
